Name: dv_noxae
Description: "On these verdant pastures, all life must bow their heads before him. In an instant, their lives may wither away, or their vitality becomes renewed."

Name: dv_dendros
Description: "Ruler of the forest. The day he begins to move again, the whole earth will tremble."

Name: dv_platum
Description: "Opinions differ on whether it is an invention, or a prank made by the gods. Perhaps it's an 'evolution.'"

Name: dv_morack
Description: "Always watch your step in the desert. However, even if you recognize it, you will not be able to avoid it."

Name: dv_grandius2
Description: "Have you heard of the elephant statue that turns stones into gold? Some claims say it is alive."

Name: dv_enochsis
Description: "Saying the ground shakes is incorrect. It cracks, tears, and is destroyed."

Name: dv_tekuma
Description: "It's gargantuan, but can instantly move. Can you even imagine?"

Name: dv_blue_dragon
Description: "If you see the Blue Dragon, that's a lucky dream. But what if it's not a dream? Then pray that you make it out alive."

Name: dv_kirin
Description: "An auspicious being that controls life, wielding magic. If he does that, the future does not look good."

Name: dv_chaa
Description: "Also known as the emissary for the gods. It is all purely stories found in myths and legends, so don't even bother thinking about looking for it."

Name: dv_aio
Description: "It is said to bring riches and good fortune. You think I'm being sentimental? Well, riches and good fortune can also be achieved through power."

Name: dv_pegasus
Description: "To be brilliant can also mean to be destructive."

Name: dv_tumtum
Description: "Let us not underestimate what lies beneath our feet. If the ceiling can crush you, the floor can send you to an abyss."

Name: dv_pheonix
Description: "True immortality is being reborn."

Name: dv_archeros
Description: "It controls dreams. What would happen if you lost your dreams?"

Name: dv_oriona
Description: "It's not predicting the future, it's just taking a peek."

Name: dv_ouroboros
Description: "Endless reincarnation signifies growth, not repetition."

Name: dv_kraken
Description: "It's not the monster that eats them, it's fear."

Name: dv_kerberos
Description: "Hell is a place only the strong can enter."

Name: dv_world_tree
Description: "Life requires sacrifice."

Name: dv_chimera
Description: "That should not exist. Not even in stories."

Name: dv_quetzalcoatl
Description: "When an ill omen appears, one must prepare sacrifices."

Name: dv_hephaestus
Description: "Divinity is sometimes forged from fear."

Name: dv_dark_dragon
Description: "They say only black ash remains in its wake."

Name: dv_jormungand
Description: "It's large enough to encompass the world. Perhaps the world has already been devoured."

Name: dv_yggdrasil
Description: "A being that governs all of space and time. Both past and future, and even fate itself."

Name: dv_seraph
Description: "All we can do is hope they take pity on us."

Name: dv_echidna
Description: "Pain that pierces the mind is worse than pain that stops the heart."

Name: dv_griffin
Description: "What do you think it means to be the most intelligent being in the universe?"

Name: dv_typhon
Description: "Kneel before greatness."

Name: dv_medusa
Description: "The moment you meet her eyes, you'll turn to Brick. It's not a metaphor."
